heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 6956 Authorization of appropriations
text: There are authorized to be appropriated to the Secretary of Commerce $5,000,000 for each of fiscal years 1980, 1981, and 1982 and $1,500,000 for each of the fiscal years 1985 through 1988 to carry out the purposes of this subchapter.
notes: Amendments1984— authorized appropriation of $1,500,000 for each of fiscal years 1985 through 1988.Pub. L. 98–616
amendments: Amendments1984— authorized appropriation of $1,500,000 for each of fiscal years 1985 through 1988.Pub. L. 98–616
